nodes.label: P2.2 synth — class-aware negatives depth curve (objective IS the lever here)
nodes.rationale: random +0.003/layer, hard-oracle +0.008/layer (visibly above random and rising toward the GD envelope), hard-unsup +0.007/layer track close to oracle; hard-proto flattest. KMeans purity annotated 0.56 (vs CIFAR's 0.23) -- clusters actually align with classes on synth, so the unsupervised negative nearly matches the oracle.
